nasb.text: “Because you are glad, because you are jubilant, O you who pillage My heritage, Because you skip about like a threshing heifer And neigh like stallions,

esv.text: “Though you rejoice, though you exult, O plunderers of my heritage, though you frolic like a heifer in the pasture, and neigh like stallions,

cnv.text: “搶奪我產業的啊！ 你們雖然歡喜快樂， 像踹穀的母牛犢跳躍， 像雄壯的馬嘶叫；

ccb.text: “抢夺我产业的巴比伦人啊， 你们欢喜快乐， 像草场上欢跳的母牛犊， 又像嘶鸣的公马。
